html:
“ Heals 30 Health.”

-

The Honey Poultice is a Survival Item. It shares a similar function to that of the Healing Salve in that it is used for Health restoration, but heals more. Honey Poultice is a tier 3 healing item and restores 30 Health, whereas Healing Salve restores 20. It requires 1 Papyrus and 2 Honey and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Honey Poultice is the highest tier of health-replenishing item. Moreover, Honey Poultice can be used to heal almost every in-game mob, except Chester and Monsters.

Contents

  • 1 Skill Tree (Walter)
    • 1.1 Field Medic
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Gallery

Skill Tree (Walter)

Field Medic

Walter with the "Field Medic" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 45 .

Trivia

  • This item was added in A Little Rain Must Fall update.
  • In older versions of Don't Starve, it was possible to repair Walls with healing items.
  • Honey's antibiotic effect has been known since ancient times, and it is/was commonly used to treat wounds.
  • A poultice is a soft medicated mass of organic matter spread on a piece of cloth. It is placed on the skin to treat aches, pain, inflammation, and cuts.

Gallery

  • Honey Poultice as seen in the poster for A Little Rain Must Fall update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thuốc đắp mật ong là một vật phẩm sinh tồn. Nó có chức năng tương tự như Healing Salve ở chỗ nó được sử dụng để phục hồi Sức khỏe, nhưng chữa lành nhiều hơn. Thuốc đắp mật ong là vật phẩm chữa bệnh cấp 3 và phục hồi 30 Máu, trong khi Thuốc chữa bệnh phục hồi 20. Nó yêu cầu 1 Giấy cói và 2 Mật ong và Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.

{{Scrapbook Info| Heals 30 Health.}}
The '''Honey Poultice''' is a [[Survival]] [[Item]]. It shares a similar function to that of the [[Healing Salve]] in that it is used for [[Health]] restoration, but heals more. Honey Poultice is a tier 3 healing item and restores 30 Health, whereas Healing Salve restores 20. It requires 1 [[Papyrus]] and 2 [[Honey]] and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype.

Honey Poultice is the highest tier of health-replenishing item. Moreover, Honey Poultice can be used to heal almost every in-game mob, except [[Chester]] and [[Monster]]s.

=={{pic|48|Insight}} Skill Tree (Walter)==
==={{PicDark|32|Field Medic}}Field Medic===
[[Walter]] with the "[[Field Medic]]" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 45 {{hp}}.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* This item was added in ''[[Version History#A Little Rain Must Fall|A Little Rain Must Fall]]'' update.
* In older versions of ''Don't Starve'', it was possible to repair [[Wall]]s with healing items.
* Honey's antibiotic effect has been known since ancient times, and it is/was commonly used to treat wounds.
* A [[wikipedia:Poultice|poultice]] is a soft medicated mass of organic matter spread on a piece of cloth. It is placed on the skin to treat aches, pain, inflammation, and cuts.
